---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new command or behavior
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you running into that this feature would solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd want the command or behavior to look like. Include example usage if possible.

```bash
# Example
portman <new-command> ...
```

## Alternatives considered

Any other ways you've tried to solve this, or other tools that do it differently.

## Would you implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR
- [ ] No, just suggesting
